    s = s[::-1]   # O(n) string concat 
    return s == s[::-1]

def is_palindrome(s):
    # Check if all characters are alphanumeric 
    s = ''.join([char for char in s])  
    
    return s == s[::-1]  # Return True only when all elements match

def _merge(left, right):
    result = []
    i=len(left)-1
    while i>=0:
        result.append(right[i]);  # Empty list — all elements are appended to the current list
        i -= 1
    return result[:len(result) - len(left)]
